name: build-log
goal: Introduce build-log.md as the human-readable inter-session handoff artifact for /ship, enabling seamless resume of stalled builds with state verification

userStories.title: Create Build Log Template
userStories.description: Create the build-log template at `.pi/skills/ship/templates/build-log.md` implementing the full schema from the plan. Include Build Context table, Current Status block, Progress section with session markers, and insertion-point comments for agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Template exists at `.pi/skills/ship/templates/build-log.md`
Template matches schema from plan (Build Context, Current Status, Progress sections)
All placeholder fields have comments explaining what to fill
`<!-- INSERT NEW SESSION HERE -->` comment present for agent guidance

userStories.title: Add Phase 0 to Ship Skill
userStories.description: Insert Phase 0 'Initialize or Resume Build Log' before Phase 1 in SKILL.md with full initialization and resume logic. If build-log exists and State ≠ COMPLETE, enter resume mode with summary display. If State = COMPLETE, warn and require confirmation. If not exists, create from template.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 0 section exists in SKILL.md before Phase 1
Running `/ship {slug}` on stalled build displays resume summary
Running `/ship {slug}` on stalled build continues from logged phase
Running `/ship {slug}` on completed build warns and requires confirmation
New builds create build-log.md from template

userStories.title: Add Verification to Phase 0
userStories.description: Add sanity-checks in Phase 0 that verify logged state matches actual artifacts before resuming. Check phase→artifact mappings: Phase 1.2 (Pre-Mortem) → pre-mortem.md exists; Phase 2.2 (Convert to PRD) → prd.md and prd.json exist; Phase 3.1 (Create Worktree) → worktree directory exists.
acceptanceCriteria: Verification checks run on resume before continuing
Phase→artifact mapping documented in Phase 0 section
Uses phase names not just numbers (e.g., 'Phase 1.2 (Pre-Mortem)')
Mismatch produces clear warning with actionable options
Stale or corrupt log does not cause silent failures

userStories.title: Update Ship Phases to Write Progress
userStories.description: Update all ship phases (1.x through 5.x) to write progress entries to build-log.md. Each phase writes Started entry on begin, Completed entry with Outcome/Decisions/Artifacts on finish. Gate pauses set State=BLOCKED with Reason. 17 phase sections to update.
acceptanceCriteria: All phase sections include 'Build Log Update' instructions
After each phase completes, build-log.md reflects accurate state
Gate pauses set State=BLOCKED with Reason
No phase completes without corresponding log update
Writes are 'atomic' (replace entire block, not incremental line additions)

userStories.title: Add Session Boundary Handling
userStories.description: Add session marker logic to Phase 0 when resume is detected. Append session marker with Started timestamp, Resumed From phase and state, optional Resolution note. Place at `<!-- INSERT NEW SESSION HERE -->` comment.
acceptanceCriteria: New session markers appended on resume
Session markers include Started, Resumed From, optional Resolution
Multiple sessions clearly distinguishable in log
Full session history preserved and readable

userStories.title: Update Documentation
userStories.description: Update AGENTS.md and ship skill Recovery section to document build-log. Add to Workspace section, add resume workflow to Workflows section, update Recovery section to reference build-log, add gotcha to LEARNINGS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md Workspace section lists build-log.md
AGENTS.md Workflows section explains resume workflow
Ship skill Recovery section references build-log (not manual artifact inspection)
Ship skill LEARNINGS.md updated with verification gotcha
New agent can find resume instructions without reading full skill file
